title: RBCD Configuration via PowerShell / PowerView
description: Detects command-line configuration of Resource-Based Constrained Delegation by writing PrincipalsAllowedToDelegateToAccount or msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity with Set-ADComputer / PowerView Set-DomainObject. Often follows a computer-account creation (MachineAccountQuota).
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*PrincipalsAllowedToDelegateToAccount*' or 'Command Line' like '*msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity*' or 'Command Line' like '*Set-ADComputer*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-ADComputer*')) and (('Command Line' like '*AllowedToAct*' or 'Command Line' like '*DelegateTo*' or 'Command Line' like '*rbcd*')))
